name: pandas-ta

performance.notes: Pure pandas/numpy; fast for typical OHLCV datasets

agent_readiness.notes: 130+ technical analysis indicators for pandas DataFrames. Extends pandas with .ta accessor. All standard indicators: SMA, EMA, MACD, RSI, Bollinger Bands, ATR, Stochastic, Ichimoku, VWAP, and 120+ more. Strategy backtesting via pd.DataFrame.ta.strategy(). Works directly with yfinance/alpaca OHLCV data. Most popular technical analysis library for Python traders.

gotchas: Project maintenance spotty — some open issues not addressed
Some indicators have known bugs in edge cases
No TA-Lib dependency (pure Python) — slightly slower for some indicators
best_when: Adding technical indicators to pandas OHLCV DataFrames
Feature engineering for ML trading models (130+ indicator features)
Rapid prototyping of technical trading strategies
Avoiding TA-Lib C dependency installation headaches
avoid_when: When TA-Lib performance is critical (pandas-ta slower)
Real-time tick data processing at high frequency
summary: pandas-ta extends pandas DataFrames with 130+ technical analysis indicators via the .ta accessor. Covers SMA, EMA, MACD, RSI, Bollinger Bands, ATR, Stochastic, Ichimoku, and more. Pure Python (no TA-Lib dependency). Works directly with yfinance OHLCV data. Best for feature engineering for trading ML models and rapid technical strategy prototyping.
